scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,WEB -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:reset: pkill -f "next dev" || true; pkill -f "nodemon" || true; pkill -f "ts-node src/index.ts" || true; npm run dev
scripts.dev:full-expo: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.check: npm run build:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
